title: aerides turma
intro: Aerides turraea, also known as Aerides turma, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Aerides turma has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
